name: Black Beans and Rice
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash the black beans and soak overnight in 2 quarts of cold water.
2. Sauté the onion (or use it raw), garlic, and green pepper in olive oil until fragrant.
3. Combine all ingredients except vinegar and rice in a pot. Cook over low heat until beans are tender.
4. Add vinegar and serve over cooked brown rice.
